name: Velopter
description: The engineer took to the skies in his invention — the flying machine Velopter. But cunning rivals strike back, launching explosive balloons to take him down! Tap the bombs to destroy them before impact. Protect the genius and his creation in this endless clicker game that tests your reflexes and focus!
instructions: Tap on incoming bombs to destroy them before they hit the engineer and his flying machine Don rsquo t let any slip through mdash every miss brings you closer to defeat Survive as long as you can and aim for the highest score
